message:
fix(time): handle non-advancing ticks in TimerWheel::advance

When target_tick_u64 <= current_tick (time hasn't advanced or moved
backward), the previous code computed ticks_to_advance = 0 via
saturating_sub, then fell through to the advance loop which would
not scan the current slot. This could miss timers that expired in
the current tick.

Add an early return that collects expired wakers from the current slot
without advancing the tick counter, ensuring timers are always fired
even when the clock hasn't moved forward.

.beads/issues.jsonl: sync bead tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
